name: pi-smith
description: A sub-agent extension for the Pi coding agent, built with Effect v4.

scripts.verify:effect: node --input-type=module --eval "import { execFileSync } from 'node:child_process'; const version = execFileSync(process.execPath, ['./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc', '--version'], { encoding: 'utf8' }).trim(); if (version !== 'Version 7.0.2+effect-tsgo.0.18.1') throw new Error('Expected patched TypeScript 7.0.2+effect-tsgo.0.18.1, received ' + version);"
scripts.fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.check: npm run verify:effect && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run pack:check
